Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.TaskDailyWorkflow

Represents the task for the improved daily workflow (a.k.a. TaskList 2.0).

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
CompletedTaskAssessmentText

The Assessment for this task

 string

None.
CourseId

The unique id for for the course the task belongs to

 integer, 64 bit

None.
CourseTitle

Course title.

 string

None.
CourseColorClass

Course colour.

 string

None.
Status

The status of the tasks

 string

None.
TaskId

The unique id for the task.

 integer, 64 bit

None.
TaskTitle

Task title.

 string

None.
TaskUrl

The content URL for the task.

 string

None.
TaskUrlTarget

Target for the task URL.

 string

None.
IconUrl

Url to related element icon.

 string

None.
BrandIconUrl

Url to a branded element icon. Used in tasklist's student/parent view

 string

None.
Deadline

Task deadline.

 date

None.
DeadlineDisplayTime

Task deadline displayed in an easy readable way

 string

None.
IsHomework

Indicates this task is marked as homework

 boolean

None.
IsPeerAssessment

Indicates this task is a peer assessment

 boolean

None.
IsSelfAssessment

Indicates this task is a self assessment

 boolean

None.
